headline: Garlic dry-down begins — water tomatoes before Monday's 89°F
weather_notes: Water e1–e4 tomatoes and potato_bags today — zone 1 last ran Jun 4, now 3 days dry with Monday at 89°F.
Stop all irrigation on w2 and w3 garlic now — 38 days to harvest opens the 2-week dry-down window before the Jun 21 cutoff.
Check c2–c4 bean seedling soil before Monday — 10-day-old sprouts need surface moisture as 89°F heat returns.

surfaced_tasks.title: Inspect for hornworms — apply Bt if found
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due Jun 10 — 29-day tomatoes enter peak hornworm window as heat returns to 89°F Monday; check lower leaves for frass today.

surfaced_tasks.title: Stop watering
surfaced_tasks.reason: Harvest is 38 days out — today is exactly 14 days before the Jun 21 stop date; begin tapering irrigation now to protect wrapper quality.

surfaced_tasks.title: Stop watering
surfaced_tasks.reason: Same timing as w2 — Italian Red hardneck is 38 days from harvest; start dry-down this weekend alongside w2.

suggested_tasks.title: Check w3 Italian Red garlic for scapes
suggested_tasks.description: Italian Red hardneck produces curling flower scapes 3–4 weeks before harvest — snap any off now to redirect energy into bulb size before Jul 15.

suggested_tasks.title: Hill 3 remaining potato_bags plants
suggested_tasks.description: Three of five plants were not hilled Jun 3 — hill before Monday's 89°F surges top growth past the effective hilling window.
